## PiGenus Alignment

- Charter function strengthened:
- Roadmap phase:
- Why this belongs in PiGenus core:

## Safety

- [ ] Keeps PiGenus a reliable private orchestration and memory node
- [ ] Does not turn PiGenus into a main LLM/GPU service
- [ ] Preserves secure defaults and secret handling
- [ ] Preserves recoverability after crashes/restarts
- [ ] Updates docs/roadmap when scope changed

## Verification

- [ ] `pigenus-guardrails`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Deployment/smoke test if operational behavior changed
